description: For the first time in centuries, the city of Rome was encircled in a network of defensive walls, known today as the “Aurelian Walls” (Latin: Moenia Aureliana). Built between 271 and 275 AD during the reigns of Emperors Aurelian and Probus, they served the city for nearly a thousand years until the advent of siege cannons rendered them obsolete. Large sections of these walls are still visible in Rome today.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in City Phase after selecting Emperor Aurelian for your Hero.
